titleStmt.title: SII 23.187: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 187. (A.R. No. 187 of 1907.) Uṟaiyūr, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District Pañchavarṇēśvara temple—on the same wall

summary.p: This registers a tax-free gift of two plots of land, one at Atiguṇakalpakanallūr and the other at Ulagarviḍaṅganallūr, for the expenses of offerings and worship in the temple of Vēndaṉ Mukkīśvaram-uḍaiya-Nāyanār at Uṟaiyūr in Rājagambhīra-vaḷanāḍu by order of the king under title Kōnērinmaikoṇḍāṉ, issued in the 32nd year of his reign.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanaccakra vartti
koṉeriṉmeṉkoṇṭāṉ
rājagembhiravaḷanāṭṭu U
ṟaiyūr ventaṉmukkiśvara
muṭaiya nāyaṉār koyildevarkaṉmi
kkum cimāheśara kaṇkāṇicey
vārkkum śrīkāriyam ceyvārkkum ko
yilk kaṇakkaṉukkum Ittevarkku veṇṭu
m nimantaṅkaḷukku Iṟuppatāka Ittevarkku In
nāṭṭut tirunāmattukkāṇiyāṉa Atiguṇakalpaka
nallūr nilam nālemukkāle Iraṇṭumāvum Ulakarvi
ṭaṅkaṉallūr nilam patiṉaiñce muṉṟumāvum
muppattiraṇṭāvatu mutal tevatāṉam Iṟaiyili
yāka Iṭakkaṭavatākap peṟaveṇumeṉṟu toṇṭai
māṉ namakkuc coṉṉapaṭi Ippaṭiye ceyyakkaṭavatāka
ccolli kaṇakkilum Iṭṭukkoḷḷakkaṭavarkaḷā
ka varikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷukkuñ coṉṉom In nilam mup
pattiraṇṭāvatu mutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka kai
kkoṇṭu nimaṉtañ celuttap paṇṇuka .
Digital edition of SII 23.187 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
